entry.title: Re: SF Variable Pay - View Details
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec

Thank you for looking into this, see below the screenshot:

The field header is missing.

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hi,

No, transformation flow is a separate type. See documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/f7161e6c20204672ac4a6d90c81762e4.html

Right now, no kind of DSP flow can write into the planning model tables. You need to load the data via SAC which of course is not what we envision for the future. 

Max

entry.title: Is it Possible to Edit the Email Body of a BTM Task Subject?
entry.content:
Unable to edit a Business Task Management (BTM) task subject or the body of the task e-mail message.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Automate it! An overview on SAP PI/PO APIs
entry.content: Great!Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Is it Possible to Edit the Email Body of a BTM Task S...
entry.content:
Currently there is no way to edit the subject or body of the business task message. 

As an alternative, you may use a workflow rule (if applicable in your business scenario) to send notification e-mails. This way it is possible to control the e-mail sent by the rule.

You can check the documentation for Workflow Rules:

Workflow Rule Document for Business ByDesign - Workflow Rules Quick Guide

entry.title: Re: Architecting Your SAP Business Data Cloud Journey – From Data to Intelligence!
entry.content: Hi Vitaly, should work now.

entry.title: Major bug in SAP. We do not need SP Key rather we should have source plant and destination field
entry.content: Currently SP Key field in MRP 2 in MM03 is created unnecessarily since we do not have any field called source plant and destination plant in S4 Hana. There are lot of problems for creation of SP key which is unique to company based on source plant and destination plant. For every new plant transfer, new SP key needs to be created and maintained. SAP has created this problem. Instead for every material, source plant and destination plant fields should have been given in MRP 2 view in MM03.

entry.title: Re: posting period - M7053
entry.content:
Hi,

thank you for the answer!

I did. The period was originally open from 08/2024 to 09/2024, so I changed it from 08/2024 to 09/2025.

However, the error message didn't change.

entry.title: Re: How to create custom API for Talent Intelligence Hub data to integrate with downstream system(s)
entry.content:
Hi @AnnaChobanska1 - Thank you for your response. CPI is Cloud Platform Integration, yes customers need to have it separately. Integration center will also work, but there are few challenges with it, like when you want to only update few specific skills/other attributes whose data got updated in last 24hrs(as you don't want to update all the skills in custom MDF daily!), that can't be achieved as TIH related options in Integration Center doesn't allow any kind of filters. Also by adding skills/other attributes daily in the MDF would create multiple records for same skills/other attributes daily as we need to maintain the effective date of change of skill/other attributes in the MDF for downstream systems. Hence we had to move towards CPI for putting any such rules, criteria while updating the custom MDF. Hope this helps!

Thanks

Ujjal

entry.title: Re: Automated Support Insights report generation in Customer Insights dashboard
entry.content: Added information on the required authorizations.

entry.title: Re: How to delete FI document generated from Goods Receip...
entry.content:
Hi Sumesh,

The expense account X in SAP is actually the same as the expense account A in the legacy system.

Since this expense account has already been posted in SAP (due to auto-posting from GR/SES), migrating the full transaction data—including postings to this same expense account—from the legacy system will distort the Trial Balance.

The key concern from the accounting team is that all balances per G/L account must remain accurate and consistent. They require that no postings to G/L accounts (especially expense accounts) exist in SAP prior to the official FICO go-live.

It's a really challenge request.

entry.title: Re: BTP Cockpit - ABAP trial instance creation issue
entry.content:
There is unfortunately a maintenance taking place on one of the shared ABAP trial systems in the US region.  

We have removed this system now from being selected when you create a new ABAP trial instance. 

If you have a user on the non-working instance you would have to delete the ABAP trial instance in your trial account and run the booster again to get on a working instance.  

Sorry for the inconvenience this might cause.

Kind regards, 

Andre

entry.title: Re: BTP TRAIL ABAP Instance Unavailable
entry.content: It is just one of the shared system that is not up.

entry.title: Re: BTP TRAIL ABAP Instance Unavailable
entry.content:
There is unfortunately a maintenance taking place on one of the shared ABAP trial systems in the US region.  

We have removed this system now from being selected when you create a new ABAP trial instance. 

If you have a user on the non-working instance you would have to delete the ABAP trial instance in your trial account and run the booster again to get on a working instance.  

Sorry for the inconvenience this might cause.

Kind regards, 

Andre

entry.title: Re: ABAP Runtime Error in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (2-Sys...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Thanks for sharing the details. The screenshot shows a generic ABAP runtime error, but unfortunately, it doesn’t include the key details (like the exact error message or program name) needed to pinpoint the issue.

Here’s what you can try:

  • Open the ABAP Runtime Errors app and click into the transaction ID to view the full short dump. Look for the exception type, program name, or any message that could hint at the cause.
  • Check if MIGO is properly scoped and if any recent changes or transports could have impacted it.
  • Make sure you have the right authorizations for MIGO.
  • If you're still stuck, it might be worth raising an SAP incident with the full dump and steps to reproduce the error.

Let us know what you find in the dump happy to help further!

I hope this will help.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: SAFT-PT - Error - 'InvoiceCustomerIDConstraint'
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm validating the SAFT-PT file, but I received the following message:

"Error: KeyRef Constraint 'InvoiceCustomerIDConstraint' violated: 74XXXX/XX (customer number)."

Upon reviewing the file, I noticed that the Customer ID appears in the Master File with the same number but without the "/XX" suffix. Before taking any action, I checked previous SAFT-PT reports and confirmed that they include invoices with this Customer ID, even though it's still not present in the Master File.

Does anyone have any insight into this issue?

Thank you,
Bartomeu

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2025
entry.content:
As on 20 May 2025,

There is indeed an outage with the existing BTP Trial ABAP Service Instances and as updated by @Andre_Fischer over the thread Error occurring while accessing SAP BTP Cloud trial account(Unexpected response code: 503) , there is maintenance activities taking place on one of the shared ABAP trial systems in the US region.   

As a corrective action re-initiate the ABAP Trial Setup Booster as a solution mentioned over the response by Andre.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Unknown AuthenticationType: OAuth2AuthorizationCode
entry.content: So this question has nothing to do with SAPUI5

entry.title: How to contact SAP Order Management How to contact SAP Order Management
entry.content:
As we want to provide better services to our users, we are planning to set up a server for resilience usage to support the production server. In normal situation, the resilience server will be inactive. In some cases when the production servers are not functioning properly, we plan to switch the service to the resilience server in order to keep the service active.

We would like to know if any extra licenses will be required given that both the servers will be used by the same group of users (i.e. no new users involved). 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: KSBB new features in S4 hana
entry.content:
I ran the transaction in my S/4HANA system and got this:

The long text shows this:

Report trees are obsolete - function to be deactivated

Message No. KN250

Diagnosis

Report calls using report trees are obsolete. The function will be deactivated permanently with the next release.

 

Procedure

To call up reports, please use role maintenance (transaction PFCG).

entry.title: Re: How to contact SAP Order Management How to contact SA...
entry.content:
To contact SAP Order Management (previously called Contracts) for various contract-related questions/requests/issues (see topics listed above), send an e-mail to SAP Order Management at sapcontractcenter@sap.com. You can find a direct link to that e-mail on the Contact Us page in the Additional Resources section page HERE. Under Contractual Questions click Submit your Question.

To help clearly describe your request and to speed up processing, make sure to add all relevant supporting information in the e-mail (e.g., customer number/company name, installation number(s), purchase order information, product, version, etc.).

An automated e-mail will be sent to you with a service ticket number. Do not delete that e-mail as you may need the ticket number to speed up processing if needed. Watch for further e-mail updates from SAP Order Management as they will work directly with you through e-mail. Note: If you do not receive the automated e-mail with the ticket number, check your spam folder.

Please contact SAP Order Management by e-mail for the following contract-related questions/issues. They do not work within the case application or via Expert Chat.

  • Request to reactivate a deleted installation
  • Request to change the company name (KBA 2098930)
  • Request to change the company address (KBA 2602869)
  • Request to delete a customer number
  • Who to contact for all contract-related questions or issues 
  • Check the pending status of a new installation request (KBA 1773826)
  • Installation number is missing or not visible (KBA 1850002)
  • Request to assign or extend a maintenance frame for an installation (KBA 1850002)
  • Issue deleting an installation number using the self-service option (KBA 1784225)
  • Request to create a new installation number if the self-service form does not work (KBA 1773826)
  • Missing contractual assigned product licenses
  • Request for information on a contract volume status
  • Billing questions
  • Adding the SU role to an end customer's installation number for SAP Partner Support (to link partner to end user installation)
  • Remove the SU role on your installation number to remove the Supported By as SAP Partner
  • Partner / end user customer account changes or questions
  • Partner S-user authorizations for end user customer accounts
  • Register a database license purchased through a 3rd party database vendor
  • Fix missing databases for software downloads 
  • Software Downloads says NO DATA AVAILABLE
  • Routed to warranty portal
  • Request to update the hardware (Operating System and/or Database) registered in the installation number (KBA 2745518)
  • License Keys application displays message: You do not have a maintenance contract for this installation. Details in KBA (see KBA 2436412)
  • System Data application displays message: A valid maintenance agreement does not exist for this system's installation.

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hi @Max_Gander,

thank you a lot for this clarification, it is very usefull !

BigQuery and SAC are very well integrated for data import so it is manageable ! 

Can DS replication flow at least read data from planning model tables ?

We would like to know if we could capitalize on the replication flow capability of Datasphere to replicate data to BigQuery table with delta load management.

This would be very usefull and more integrated than use SAC Export APIs, which can of course handle delta load export.

Thank you again,

Best regards,

Ferdinand

entry.title: Re: KSBB new features in S4 hana
entry.content: yes even i can see the same error but need to know is there any alternatives provided by SAP like FIROI app or any new t code provided?

entry.title: Place image at top right in Compensation Statement
entry.content:
Hello Consultants,

I am working on a custom statement where we want to display a blue abstract design at the extreme top right side of the 1st pdf page. But after a certain point, the image disappears from the view.
Below is the screenshot where some margin space still comes from top and right. More negative margin pushes image out of view. Is there any way for aligning the image at top right?

Any suggestions? @xavierlegarrec 
SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Re: Quering document lines in user define values
entry.content:
Hi,

Just to clarify, are you using this query in the Query manager or manually triggering the FMS with the magnifying glass? Because this works for me (HANA version, FP2502).

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Re: Adoption of the EUR and new company code in EUR in Pu...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

 

How to transfer configuration to the new EUR company code using CBC

  • When SAP releases Bulgaria EUR content, you can create the new company code in CBC.
  • CBC lets you copy configuration objects (like chart of accounts, fiscal settings) from your existing BGN company code to the new EUR company code.
  • This is the most automated way within the Public Cloud just select relevant scopes and copy settings.
  • You’ll still need to manually review and adjust country-specific or currency-specific configs.

 

About SAP technical team and system copies

  • SAP does tenant refreshes (copy Prod to Dev/Test) on request, usually taking 1–2 weeks.
  • They do not do company code copies.
  • So new company codes with different currencies have to be set up and configured via CBC, not by system copy.

 

I hope this will help.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: restricting users in the creation of business partners by grouping by a custom authorization object.
entry.content:
We have attempted to create a custom authorization object using transaction code SU21 since we could not find a standard authorization object for business partner grouping, but we are encountering difficulties mapping the newly created object to the required field—vendor grouping. I am also unsure whether this approach will effectively meet our requirements.

Could you please guide us on how to properly map the authorization object to the vendor grouping field, or suggest an alternative method if this approach is not viable?

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Runtime Error in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (2-Sys...
entry.content:
Hi Jeremy, Thank you so much for taking the time to go through my issue and for providing such clear guidance. I really appreciate your detailed suggestions—they're very helpful. I'll check the ABAP Runtime Errors app and follow the steps you mentioned.
Thanks again for your support!
Best regards,
Sanjay

entry.title: QR-Code on Dunning forms
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have a question regarding the printing of QR-Codes on Dunning forms for our company in Austria. We want to simplify the payment process for our customers by offering them a QR-Code by which they can easily get the relevant payment infos in their bank payment apps. This has nothing to do with the swiss QR-Iban-system. E.g. we want to print a QR-Code which includes the name and IBAN of our company, the payment reference and amount of the open items on the dunning form. So here is the question, do you know if there is an easy way to set up that in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Many thanks for your input and help!

BR Katrin

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hi Ferdinand,

Unfortunately, Replication Flow cannot consume the planning table directly. Also looking into this but it is not as straight forward as I thought to be honest. E.g., we need to introduce primary keys to the planning model fact tables. Not sure when we can do that. 

You can check if you can achieve it with an additional persistency. Of course, this consumes capacity.

entry.title: SAP IAS - Do we need users in SAP IAS if we use corporate IDP for Authentication
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

If we have corporate IDP and IAS is used as proxy IDP, do we need to sync the users from any source systems to SAP IAS?  I know for the fact that for SF story reporting the users must exist in SAP IAS. But apart from that only for authentication to any other application, do we need users in SAP IAS when we use corporate IDP ?

Here is a use case: 

I want all the users to get authenticated against the corporate IDP (e.g. Azure), when they are accessing any of the below applications. So in that case do we need the corporate users to exist in IAS? 

1. S4 HANA Public Cloud

2. SAP SAC

3.SAP ARIBA

Thanks

Sanjay

entry.title: Re: SAP VIM PDF Invoice
entry.content: Thanks, That works Hakanhaslaman

entry.title: Re: How to synchronize Set Controlling Hierarchies in SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I would like to add my experience with profit center hierarchies replication, it seems that manual replication:

- deletes old time dependancies for standard hierarchy and only actual hierarchy works in fiori reports

- does not delete time dependancies for other than standard hierarchies - report works and displays data also for hierarchy with older time dependancy. 

Kind regards

Martina

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Changes to ChaRM Phase Cycle Z_IJ5_P...
entry.content:
Hello Srinivas V, 

I am not sure if I understand your current transport tracks

Maintenance: KL6 CD2 EF3 GH4 IJ5 AB1
Project: KL6 MN7 IJ5 AB1

HANA DB migration IJ5
HANA DB migration Done in AB1, CD2

TMS Final: KL6 EF3 GH4

What I can say is that what you define at TMS level for the final transport routes is the reality and what you define in the Logical component group cannot go againts the TMS reality... After making the changes at TMS level you will need to redefine the two cycles.

Hope this helps, 

Dolores

entry.title: ‌🇮🇪‌ Irish HR & Payroll Focus Group Meeting - Dublin
entry.content:
We’re excited to invite you to the upcoming meeting on Irish HR & Payroll, hosted by the UK & Ireland SAP User Group (UKISUG)! 

SAP expert Bianca Ball will be presenting an SAP legislative update:
- pension auto enrolment
- EU Pay Directive
- SEPA file format changes
- single pension scheme for Public Sector
- SAP enhancements to gender pay gap reporting
- 2026 budget preparation
- B2B Revenue reporting requirements

Empower yourself with the expertise and strategies to effectively manage payroll, HR, and compliance challenges!

This event is targeted at members of UKISUG.

Learn more about the event here.

If you want to get more information about the Irish Payroll topics provided by SAP experts, join the UKI Finance and HCM Localisation Work Zone group.

entry.title: Re: Oauth configuration for MAIL type destination in cloud IAG
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently in the process of configuring an OAuth mail destination for IAG. While the setup functions correctly with basic authentication, we are not receiving email notifications when using OAuth2 client credentials.

Is your issue resolved? Can you pls share how?

Thanks,

Namrata

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Changes to ChaRM Phase Cycle Z_IJ5_P...
entry.content: Hello @DoloresCorrea

entry.title: Training and Event Management: Attendee list Not creating
entry.content:
Dear Professional,

I have completed the configuration and all the things required for Training module, but when i am trying to book/create the attendee list via PV07. it takes around 5 minutes to buffer, and gives me ABAP runtime error. I think i am doing the right process:

Its urgent.

Thanks,

Marium khan

 

HCM (Human Capital Management)

entry.title: VIM Taking other Business partner when invoice comes with same amount and reference num but
entry.content:
Vendor sending same Invoice with same $ and Reference repeatedly,

Invoices are coming twice into VIM as system doesn’t flag it as duplicate because,

Main BP
171520868

It has Partners in the same BP
1716202376
1717293934

1st Invoice coming with same amount and Reference and processing for main BP 171520868,
Again, d same invoice is coming and processing with 1716202376, it’s not suspecting it as duplicate.

We do not have, /OTX/PF_BC_VNDR_IDENT or /OTX/PF_VNDR_RULES configurations in SAP VIM 16.3 BC, also don't have BC sets for this vendor thing to activate.

invoices come through Gmail into SAP from vendor.


How can we overcome this please help in detail.

 

Thanks In Advance.
